description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and a predominantly brown exterior, accented by clean lines and geometric forms. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and layered appearance. Large windows and glass doors are strategically placed, allowing for ample natural light and views of the outdoor spaces, including a private courtyard with a swimming pool and landscaped areas. The front facade includes a prominent garage door, a recessed main entryway with steps, and vertical window slits for added visual interest. The property is surrounded by a paved sidewalk and minimalistic landscaping, including tall, slender trees and shrubs. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on horizontal lines, open spaces, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with geometric forms, large windows, and a private courtyard with a pool. The exterior is brown with clean lines and minimalistic landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage door, vertical window slits, and landscaped sidewalk with tall trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered structure, private courtyard, and pool area with visible palm tree.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the open courtyard, pool, and large glass doors leading to the interior living spaces.
description_view_3: Alternate front angle emphasizing the main entrance steps, garage, and symmetrical landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertical strips and large glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, flanked by vertical windows and minimalistic landscaping, no porch or columns
